title: Generation of knockout and rescue cell lines using CRISPR-Cas9 genome editing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a2s33","text":"This protocol describes the genetic modification of cultured cells using CRISPR-Cas9, including synthesis of reagents, transfection, selection and screening of single clones, and sequencing of genomic DNA to confirm mutations. In addition, this protocol describes CRISPR-Cas9 mediated repair of single base deletions or insertions by CRISPR-Cas9.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: William Hancock-Cerutti
